title: portulaca obtusifolia
intro: Portulaca obtusifolia, also known as the common purslane or small-seeded portulaca, is a succulent plant species belonging to the Portulacaceae family. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Portulaca obtusifolia include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and boosting the immune system. The plant can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and it is also used in cooking and as a garnish, adding a tangy and slightly sour flavor to various dishes.
